creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 151015
x11-themes/gnome-icons-blank-on PORT source

x11-themes/gnome-icons-blank-on - Icon theme for Gnome, Xfce4 desktop.

This might be better categorized as a "revive". you decide. :)

Please find gnome-icons-blank-on.shar for the source (attached).
Please also find the requisite QA, also attached.

Thank you for all your time, and consideration.

--Chris

NOTE: this port also has a RUN_DEPENDS on x11-themes/gnome-icons-gorilla

See pr(1):
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=196312

Happy New Year!
